/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vep_annotator.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o vep_annotator  libvep_annotator_lib.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libhts.dylib
